subcodes.first_line: This is not the day for questions. When thou hearest the call of thy Lord, say: "Here am I, O Beloved of the worlds!" Therefore consider [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لیس الیوم یوم السوال اذا سمعت ندآء ربک قل لبیک یا محبوب العالمین فانظر فی
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @living waters; water of life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
